name: THE BAR

violations.description: Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not provided in sufficient number and/or not accessible to allow convenient use by employees. - Hand washing sink obstructed and being used for other purposes. Green scour pad found in the sink.
Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)* were not maintained in good repair. - Ceiling is in need of repair.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)

source_address: 1004 S SIX MILE RD, Sioux Falls
